title: rubus retinervis
intro: Rubus retinervis, also known as the net-veined bramble, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus retinervis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Rubus retinervis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
